suite.name: Test Stack Usage

test.name: 单进程栈内存使用率测试

kw.name: 连接 SSH服务器
kw.msg: C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\site-packages\paramiko\pkey.py:100: CryptographyDeprecationWarning: TripleDES has been moved to cryptography.hazmat.decrepit.ciphers.algorithms.TripleDES and will be removed from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.algorithms in 48.0.0. "cipher": algorithms.TripleDES, C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\site-packages\paramiko\transport.py:259: CryptographyDeprecationWarning: TripleDES has been moved to cryptography.hazmat.decrepit.ciphers.algorithms.TripleDES and will be removed from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.algorithms in 48.0.0. "class": algorithms.TripleDES,
kw.doc: 建立与远程Linux服务器的SSH连接 :param 主机地址: 服务器IP或域名 :param 用户名: SSH登录用户名 :param 密码: SSH登录密码（可选，优先使用密钥） :param 密钥文件路径: SSH私钥文件路径（可选） :param 端口: SSH端口，默认22 :return: 连接成功返回True，失败抛出异常

kw.name: 采集并分析进程栈内存
kw.msg: Downloading stack-only smaps for PID 99999 to ./data\smaps_99999.txt...
Command failed (2): awk: cannot open /proc/99999/smaps (No such file or directory)
Stack filtering failed via awk. Falling back to full smaps download...
Command failed (1): cat: /proc/99999/smaps: No such file or directory
Failed to download smaps for PID 99999
kw.doc: 采集指定PID的栈内存数据并进行分析 :param 进程ID: 目标进程ID :return: (栈上限KB, 实际使用KB)
kw.status: Failed to download smaps for PID 99999

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: 生成栈内存分析报告
kw.doc: 生成栈内存分析报告 :param 输出文件路径: 报告保存路径，默认使用系统配置路径 :param 使用率阈值: 报警阈值百分比，默认80% :return: 报告结果，PASS/FAIL/ERROR

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: 测试指定进程栈内存使用率是否在安全范围内
test.status: Failed to download smaps for PID 99999

suite.doc: 远程进程栈内存监控测试用例集
